description_long: This is a charming single-story bungalow with light blue horizontal siding and a complex, multi-gabled roof covered in reddish-brown shingles. The front facade features a prominent arched window with decorative muntins and a flower box beneath, as well as a small covered entry porch with steps leading up to the door. Multiple white-framed windows of varying sizes are distributed asymmetrically around the structure, providing ample natural light. A large, white chimney rises along one side of the house, adding to its classic suburban character. The foundation is slightly raised, with visible basement windows on some sides. The overall design suggests a cozy, family-oriented home typical of North American neighborhoods.
description: A light blue, single-story bungalow with a multi-gabled brown shingle roof, white trim, and a prominent arched front window. Features include a small porch, a large chimney, and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Front and left side view showing the arched window, flower box, entry porch, and multiple white-trimmed windows.
description_view_1: Right side view dominated by the large white chimney and a gable end, with minimal window visibility.
description_view_2: Rear and left side view displaying a back door, basement windows, and additional white-trimmed windows.
description_view_3: Back view with a simple facade, a single small window, and the roof's full span visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with prominent arched front window and grouped side windows
